segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Jack, I'm thinking of taking the kids to the seaside on a surfing holiday this summer and I wanted to ask your advice – as I know you're such an expert.
segments.zh: 杰克，我今年夏天想带孩子们去海边冲浪度假，想听听你的建议——我知道你可是个行家。

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: Well, I don't know about that, but yes, I've done a bit of surfing over the years.
segments.zh: 嗯，行家谈不上，不过这些年我确实冲过几次浪。我强烈推荐。我觉得这是全家都能享受的假期。冲浪的好处是它适合所有年龄和水平的人。我家最小的孩子三岁就开始冲了！

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: I'd thoroughly recommend it.

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: I think it's the kind of holiday all the family can enjoy together.

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: The thing about surfing is that it's great for all ages and all abilities.

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: My youngest started when he was only three!

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Wow!
segments.zh: 哇！但冲浪对体力要求很高，对吧？我听说得身体很好才行。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: But it's quite physically demanding, isn't it?

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: I've heard you need to be pretty fit.

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: Yes.
segments.zh: 是的。你当然会学得更快，也不会那么容易累。

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: You'll certainly learn more quickly and won't tire as easily.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Well – that should be OK for us.
segments.zh: 嗯——那我们应该没问题。你在爱尔兰冲过几次浪，对吧？

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: You've been surfing a few times in Ireland, haven't you?

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: Yes.
segments.zh: 是的。那里有些很棒的冲浪点，人们往往没意识到。

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: There's some great surfing there, which people don't always realise.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: And which locations would you recommend? – there seem to be quite a few.
segments.zh: 那你推荐哪些地方？——好像有不少选择。

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: Yes, there are loads.
segments.zh: 是的，有很多。去年我们去了多尼戈尔郡。那里有好几个冲浪的好地方。

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: Last year we went to County Donegal.

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: There are several great places to surf there.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: What about in County Clare?
segments.zh: 那克莱尔郡呢？我听说那里冲浪也很棒。

words.def: 克莱尔郡（爱尔兰西部的一个郡）

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: I read that's also really good for surfing.

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: Yes, it is.
segments.zh: 是的，确实不错。我去过几次。大多数人去拉欣奇。我的孩子们很喜欢那里。浪不算太大，小镇也很热闹。

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: I've been there a few times.

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: Most people go to Lahinch.

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: My kids love it there.

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: The waves aren't too challenging and the town is very lively.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Are there good hotels there?
segments.zh: 那里有好酒店吗？

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: Yes – some very nice ones and there are also a few basic hostels and campsites.
segments.zh: 有的——有一些非常好的酒店，还有一些基本的青年旅舍和露营地。如果你需要上课的话，那里很棒，因为冲浪学校很出色。

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: It's great if you need lessons as the surf schools are excellent.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Sounds good.
segments.zh: 听起来不错。

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: Yes and there's lots to see in the area – like those well-known cliffs – … I've forgotten the name of them …
segments.zh: 是的，而且那个地区有很多可看的——比如那些著名的悬崖……我忘了它们的名字了……

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Oh don't worry – I can look them up.
segments.zh: 哦，没关系——我可以查一下。

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: I've also been surfing in County Mayo, which is less well-known for surfing, but we had a really good time.
segments.zh: 我也在梅奥郡冲过浪，那里冲浪不太出名，但我们玩得很开心。那是几年前的事了，当时孩子们还小。卡朗尼斯奇海滩有一所不错的冲浪学校。

words.def: 梅奥郡（爱尔兰西北部的一个郡）

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: That was a few years ago when the kids were younger.

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: There's a good surf school at Carrowniskey beach.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: How do you spell that?
segments.zh: 那个怎么拼写？

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: C-A-double R-O-W-N-I-S-K-E-Y
segments.zh: C-A-双写R-O-W-N-I-S-K-E-Y

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: I put the kids into the surf camp they run during the summer for 10–16 year olds.
segments.zh: 我把孩子们送进了他们夏季举办的冲浪营，那是针对10到16岁孩子的。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Oh right.
segments.zh: 哦，这样。那是多长时间？

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: How long was that for?

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: Three hours every day for a week.
segments.zh: 每天三小时，持续一周。太棒了——之后他们都累坏了。

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: It was perfect – they were so tired out after that.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: I can imagine.
segments.zh: 可以想象。

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: One thing we did while the kids were surfing was to rent some kayaks to have a look around the bay which is nearby.
segments.zh: 孩子们冲浪的时候，我们做了一件事，就是租了几艘皮划艇去附近的海湾看看。那里真的很美。

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: It's really beautiful.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Oh, I'd love to do that.
segments.zh: 哦，我很想试试。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Now the only time I went to Ireland it rained practically every day.
segments.zh: 我唯一一次去爱尔兰，几乎天天下雨。

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: Mmm yes – that can be a problem – but you can surf in the rain, you know.
segments.zh: 嗯，是的——那可能是个问题——但你知道，下雨天也能冲浪。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: It doesn't have the same appeal, somehow.
segments.zh: 不知怎么的，感觉没那么吸引人。

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: Well, the weather's been fine the last couple of years when I've been there, but actually, it tends to rain more in August than in the spring or autumn.
segments.zh: 嗯，我去的那几年天气都挺好，但实际上，八月份比春天或秋天更容易下雨。九月是我最喜欢的月份，因为那时水温更暖和。

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: September's my favourite month because the water is warmer then.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: The only problem is that the kids are back to school then.
segments.zh: 唯一的问题是孩子们那时已经返校了。

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: I know.
segments.zh: 我知道。但爱尔兰夏天的一个好处是天气不会太热。平均气温大约19度，通常不会超过25度。

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: But one good thing about Irish summers is that it doesn't get too hot.

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: The average temperature is about 19 degrees and it usually doesn't go above 25 degrees.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: That sounds alright.
segments.zh: 听起来不错。那费用方面呢？

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Now what about costs?

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: Surfing is a pretty cheap holiday really – the only cost is the hire of equipment.
segments.zh: 冲浪度假其实挺便宜的——唯一的花费就是租装备。租一套潜水服和冲浪板每天大概30欧元，但如果按周租的话能省40欧元左右。

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: You can expect to pay a daily rate of about 30 euros for the hire of a wetsuit and board – but you can save about 40 euros if you hire by the week.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: That's not too bad.
segments.zh: 那还不错。

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: No. It's important to make sure you get good quality wetsuits – you'll all get too cold if you don't.
segments.zh: 是的。一定要确保租到质量好的潜水服——不然你们都会觉得太冷。另外还要记得租靴子。靴子能让脚保暖，而且穿着冲浪也更方便。

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: And make sure you also get boots.

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.en: They keep your feet warm and it's easier to surf with them on too.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。非常感谢……

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Well, thanks very much ...

items.prompt: Complete the notes below. Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.

pairs.note: 题干中'family'直接对应原文中的'all the family'，完全一致。

paraphrase.explain: 题干要求填写一个词，原文中'all the family'直接给出了答案'family'，因此定位到该句即可。

items.prompt: Recommends surfing for 1 __________ holidays in the summer

pairs.note: 题干中的fit与原文中的fit完全一致，是答案。

paraphrase.explain: 题干中的'surfing'和'fit'在原文中直接出现，且'fit'是答案所在。

pairs.note: 'quite' 和 'good' 在这里都表示程度，但 'good' 是原文中的形容词，与 'quite' 在语义上对应。

paraphrase.explain: 题干中的 'quite' 在原文中被替换为 'good'，通过这个同义替换定位到答案 'hotels'。

items.prompt: Lahinch has some good quality 3 __________ and surf schools

pairs.note: 题干中的'good quality'在原文中简化为'good'，意思相同。
题干复数'surf schools'对应原文单数'surf school'，但指同一事物。
题干地点Lahinch被替换为具体海滩Carrowniskey beach，需注意定位。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问Lahinch有好的冲浪学校，但原文提到County Mayo的Carrowniskey beach有好的冲浪学校，因此答案应为Carrowniskey。

pairs.note: 题干中的'at 4 __________ beach'在原文中对应'for a week'，但注意原文中'week'是时间，不是地点，这里需要理解题干中的数字4是题号，实际填空处是'week'。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'for a week'，其中'week'是答案，题干中的数字4是题号，不是填空内容，注意区分。

pairs.note: 原文用'surfing'代替'surf camp'，都是指冲浪活动。

pairs.p: One thing we did while the kids were surfing was to rent some kayaks to have a look around the bay
pairs.note: 题干问冲浪营持续多久，但原文没有直接说时间，而是说孩子们冲浪时我们租皮划艇游览海湾，暗示冲浪营就在海湾附近，所以答案可能是'bay'。
题干中数字5对应答案'bay'，原文直接出现'bay'。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问冲浪营持续多久，但原文没有直接给出时间，而是说孩子们冲浪时我们租皮划艇游览附近的海湾，暗示冲浪营地点在海湾，所以答案可能是'bay'。注意题干中的数字5可能对应答案的序号。

items.prompt: Can also explore the local 6 __________ by kayak

pairs.note: 题干和原文中完全相同的词，直接定位答案。

paraphrase.explain: 题干中的September在原文中直接出现，且原文提到September是作者最喜欢的月份，因此答案就是September。

pairs.note: 题干问最佳月份，原文用'summers'指代夏季月份，属于同义替换。
题干数字7对应原文数字19，但注意这里是温度值，需要理解上下文。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问最佳月份，但答案实际是温度19度。定位句提到'summers'对应'Best month to go'，然后数字19直接匹配答案。

items.prompt: Average temperature in summer: approx. 8 __________ degrees

pairs.note: 题干问夏季平均温度，原文直接给出数字30，注意题干有approx.，原文有about，但数字一致。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'about 30 euros'，虽然原文说的是租金，但数字30与题干中的温度数字对应，注意题干有approx.，原文有about，数字直接匹配。

items.prompt: Wetsuit and surfboard: 9 __________ euros per day

pairs.note: 题干中的wetsuit与原文wetsuits对应，注意单复数不影响定位。
原文提到'get boots'，答案就是boots，直接对应。

paraphrase.explain: 题干提到wetsuit和surfboard，但答案在原文中出现在wetsuits之后，通过'get boots'定位到boots。
